steps.title: Spot the causal relationship
steps.content: The first sentence establishes that voting members were impressed by the album. The second sentence states they awarded it an award. The transition must show that the award logically follows from the impression.

steps.title: Match the signal
steps.content: ”Accordingly” means “as a consequence”—it connects the impression to the resulting award. In contrast and nevertheless reverse this logic by suggesting the award happened despite the impression, while meanwhile lacks causation entirely. That matches choice D — D is correct.
